seo.title: Odyssey | Premium automated cinematic memorial videos
seo.description: Odyssey is a premium platform for automated cinematic commemorative video creation to preserve, share, and honor memory.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.subtitle: Questions about a tribute, an ongoing project, or uncertainty before ordering? Tell us where you stand — we respond thoughtfully.

partnersPage.title: Odyssey partnerships
partnersPage.subtitle: Funeral homes, networks, and bereavement professionals: offer families a cinematic remembrance journey. Describe your organization and needs — we’ll explore a tailored rollout.

hooks: Their life deserves the big screen.
A tribute fit for the big screen.
steps: Three steps. A film for keeps.
Three steps. A presence that stays.
Three steps. Memory that lives on.
Three steps. A tribute that honors them.
memory: Their story, cut like a film.

pricing.title: My Life in Cinema
pricing.subtitle: Choose how deeply you want to honor their story — each tier lets you move at your own pace.

tiers.style: Sensitive pacing, music at the heart
features: Weaving in moments from loved ones
Focus on the passages that matter most

manifesto.title: Manifesto
manifesto.body: Every life is a masterpiece that deserves its own cinema. Odyssey is not a tool; it is a visual sanctuary. In the noise of grief, we orchestrate silence, light, and memory to create an unbreakable bond. We don't just make videos; we restore the sovereign dignity of remembrance.

process.title: THE ODYSSEY PROCESS
process.timelineHint: Three chapters of one film — material, edit, legacy.
process.subtitle: Three steps for families: gather what matters, entrust the edit, receive a film worthy of them.

steps.title: Your photos, videos, and archives
steps.body: You upload what tells their story. We secure every fragment with a clear, respectful structure.

steps.title: The edit takes shape
steps.body: We compose rhythm, light, and narrative to honor the family’s emotion and intent.

steps.title: A film meant to be shared
steps.body: The film becomes something to pass on: restrained, cinematic, faithful to the dignity of remembrance.

auth.verificationBody: Check your inbox. A magic link has been sent to activate your studio access.
auth.confirmationMessage: A confirmation link has been sent. Please validate your email to activate your access key.
auth.marketingConsent: I want to receive exclusive updates and Odyssey roadmaps.
auth.legalSignupIntro: By signing up, you agree to our

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials or account not found.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Use at least 8 characters with one number or one uppercase letter.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tributeWizard.stepEssentialDescription: What gives this tribute a face and a soul. Move at your own pace.
tributeWizard.primaryPhotoHint: A portrait or picture that reflects them lovingly.
tributeWizard.stepSourcesDescription: Would you like to gather memories from social networks or online albums?
tributeWizard.socialQuickLoginNote: Quick connection when your browser is already signed in to these services.
tributeWizard.stepMediaDescription: Drop all your memories here — photos and videos. You'll arrange them on the editing table next.
tributeWizard.uploadPrompt: Click or drag your files here
tributeWizard.uploadSubtext: Photos and videos — we handle them with care.
tributeWizard.uploadAtLeastOne: Add at least one media to open the Editing Table.
tributeWizard.uploadLimitReachedHint: Your package includes up to {max} media items. Upgrade to a higher package to add more.
tributeWizard.uploadLimitOverflowRejection: Maximum {max} media items allowed for your package.
tributeWizard.uploadLimitExceededItemError: Rejected by the server: your package's limit of {max} media items has been reached.
tributeWizard.projectDraftIdle: Storage space waiting to be initialised.
tributeWizard.projectDraftErrorTitle: We could not prepare your storage space.
tributeWizard.stepMontageDescription: Assign memories to the three acts and set the playback order.
tributeWizard.montageEmpty: No media available. Return to the Vault to add files.
tributeWizard.montageFocalHint: Click the image to set the focal point
tributeWizard.montageUnassignedHint: Off timeline — drag to an act to reassign.
tributeWizard.montageSelectionHint: Drag the ⋮⋮ handle to move the group
tributeWizard.montageDuplicatesHint: Same file imported more than once — the oldest copy is kept.
tributeWizard.montageNeedOneIncluded: Keep at least one included medium to continue.
tributeWizard.basePackageEssentialDesc: Full narrative edit and digital delivery.
tributeWizard.basePackageSignatureDesc: Standard music catalog included · 9:16 Social clip.
tributeWizard.basePackageHeritageDesc: Premium catalog · personal MP3 (salon) · license, collector USB, and digital vault included.
tributeWizard.basePackageLegendaryDesc: White Gloves service, 4K finish, and premium handling.
tributeWizard.headerNarrativeSummary: Your tribute film will run for about {minutes} minutes and hold up to {mediaMax} media.
tributeWizard.headerDowngradeWarning: Switching to {package} will remove {count} already-chosen song(s) — this action can't be undone.
tributeWizard.stepMontageDescription: Compose your film chapter by chapter. All chapters and media are visible on one screen.
tributeWizard.mediaBankColumnEmpty: All media are placed in a chapter.
tributeWizard.montageOnboardingTitle: How would you like to compose your film?
tributeWizard.montageOnboardingDescription: Choose a gentle start. You can always refine each chapter afterward.
tributeWizard.montageOnboardingMagicHint: We place your media intelligently in each chapter, paced to your songs.
tributeWizard.montageOnboardingManualHint: Start from a blank canvas and drag your memories at your own pace.
tributeWizard.montageMagicToast: Here's a first proposal. Adjust as you wish.
tributeWizard.montageChapterClearConfirmTitle: Clear this chapter? Media will return to the bank.
tributeWizard.mediaBankHint: Select one or more media, then confirm at the bottom of the screen.
tributeWizard.mediaBankEmpty: All your media are placed on the timeline.
tributeWizard.montageTimelineEmptyHint: Open the media bank to place your memories in this chapter.
tributeWizard.montageTimelineSequenceAria: Playback order for the active chapter
tributeWizard.soundSearchPlaceholder: Search for an artist or song (e.g. Charles Aznavour)
tributeWizard.soundSearchHint: Thousands of licensed tracks, ready for your film.
tributeWizard.soundNoResults: No tracks found. Try another word.
tributeWizard.soundServiceUnavailable: Music service temporarily unavailable, please try again.
tributeWizard.soundCatalogAccessStandard: You have access to the Standard catalog. For extended rights (Premium), add the Premium License option ($39) in Extensions.
tributeWizard.soundCatalogAccessPremium: Premium catalog unlocked — extended-rights tracks for your tribute.
tributeWizard.stepChaptersDescription: Choose a song for each chapter of your film — its real duration sets the available space for your memories.
tributeWizard.chapterEducationBanner: For the best cinematic experience, we recommend choosing tracks of at least 3 to 4 minutes.
tributeWizard.chapterShortTrackWarning: Short track: little room left for your media once the intro and outro are reserved. Prefer a 3-4 minute track if possible.
tributeWizard.chaptersProgress: {count} of {total} chapters with a chosen song
tributeWizard.chapterMaxReachedHint: Maximum number of chapters reached for your plan ({max}).
tributeWizard.chapterCapacityPending: Choose a song to see the recommended capacity
tributeWizard.chapterStructureErrorTitle: More songs are needed for this amount of media.
tributeWizard.chapterStructureErrorHint: This plan recommends at least {min} song(s) for {mediaCount} media — you have chosen {selected}.
tributeWizard.chapterDuplicateWarning: You've selected the same song in more than one chapter — make sure this is intentional before continuing.
tributeWizard.chapterDuplicateAckLabel: I confirm I want to use the same song more than once in my film.
tributeWizard.stepExtensionsDescription: Curate your luxury keepsake — each option is a gesture of care for your tribute.
tributeWizard.extensionAiRetouchDescription: I automatically refresh and beautify your photos.
tributeWizard.extensionMusicLicenseDescription: Unlocks the official Stingray catalog for the master — Soft Cap on Keepsake (included from Heritage).
tributeWizard.extensionExtendedLicenseDescription: Unlocks the official Stingray catalog for the master — Soft Cap on Keepsake (included from Heritage).
tributeWizard.extensionStoryVoiceDescription: A warm AI narration that carries the thread of your tribute.
tributeWizard.extensionSanctuaryTokenDescription: An elegant NFC token that opens the deceased’s digital salon.
tributeWizard.extensionCollectorUsbDescription: An elegant NFC token that opens the deceased’s digital salon.
tributeWizard.extensionMemoryBookDescription: A finely printed book of your dearest memories, delivered to your door.
tributeWizard.extensionDigitalVaultDescription: I keep my film safe for 50 years for my grandchildren.
tributeWizard.extensionHeritagePackDescription: AI retouch, music license, and digital vault — the essential trio in one tap.
tributeWizard.extensionHeritagePackIncludes: Includes AI retouch, Premium music license, and digital vault.
tributeWizard.extensionsRecapEmpty: No extensions yet — choose the ones that matter to you.
tributeWizard.musicUploadPersonalHint: MP3 or WAV — you attest you hold the rights for this tribute.
tributeWizard.musicUploadTosLabel: By uploading this file, I certify that I hold the rights needed for personal use in this tribute. I understand Odyssey grants no license on this content, and that any social-media publication is my sole responsibility.
tributeWizard.musicUploadFailed: Could not import this file. Please try again.
tributeWizard.musicUploadUnsupported: Unsupported format — please use MP3 or WAV.
tributeWizard.musicUploadNeedsAttestation: Please accept the music rights attestation first.
tributeWizard.stepPreviewDescription: Your tribute is almost ready. Here is a glimpse of the emotion awaiting you.
tributeWizard.previewPayCta: I love it — proceed to payment
tributeWizard.previewValueNote: Your complete film will run about {minutes} minutes, with professional quality
tributeWizard.previewTeaserEmpty: Add photos to your edit to generate a preview.
tributeWizard.stepCheckoutDescription: Review your selection and proceed to secure checkout.
tributeWizard.checkoutSecureNote: Secure payment by Stripe · your card details never touch our servers.
tributeWizard.checkoutPartnerRecap: Debited from your Odyssey token balance (wholesale cost $40 / token).
tributeWizard.checkoutPayError: Unable to start checkout. Please try again shortly.
tributeWizard.checkoutStayFreeHint: You’ve started building a Heritage tribute. To finish at 0 $, we’ll recenter on the complimentary Keepsake package.
tributeWizard.checkoutAmputationHint: Media beyond 50 and official catalog tracks will need to be removed, and the Music License turned off.
tributeWizard.softCapMediaUnlockBody: You’ve gathered enough memories to open the Heritage canvas — up to 125 media, 4K master. No card required to continue.
tributeWizard.softCapMediaMagicTitle: Your story already weaves {count} memories together
tributeWizard.softCapMediaMagicBody: So no moment is left in the dark, unlock the Heritage canvas — up to 125 media, 4K master.
tributeWizard.softCapMusicTitle: This music already carries your story
tributeWizard.softCapMusicBody: Keep this official Stingray catalog track. Choose the Premium Music License, or open the Heritage casket (music included + 4K).
tributeWizard.softCapMediaBannerBody: Your canvas is expanding to hold all your memories — up to 125 media. No card required: you only pay at export time.
tributeWizard.checkoutExcessMediaNotice: Your project has {count} media over the free package limit.
tributeWizard.checkoutGoToMediaLink: Go back to the Media step to remove photos manually
tributeWizard.stepAmbianceDescription: Choose the tone that will carry this tribute.
tributeWizard.moodHint: Pick one path forward — you can refine later.
tributeWizard.tracksReorderHint: Drag to change the listening order.
tributeWizard.completedMessage: Your choices are saved. We will prepare your tribute with care.
tributeWizard.validationEssential: Please enter first name, last name, and both dates to continue.

apiErrors.ERR_UNAUTHENTICATED: Your session has expired. Sign in again to access the partner space.
apiErrors.ERR_FORBIDDEN: You do not have access to this resource for this partner workspace.
apiErrors.ERR_WALLET_NOT_FOUND: Token wallet not found for this partner workspace.
apiErrors.ERR_INTERNAL: Something went wrong. Please try again.

partnerships.title: A cinematic standard for high-trust funeral homes.
partnerships.body: Offer every family a premium remembrance experience that is elegant, reliable, and respectful of grief. Families choose their tribute and tier in the pricing section above.
